message:
fix(e2e): add /health mock, seed backend status, improve debug output (#10806)

- Add route mock for /health (without /api prefix) to match checkBackendAvailability()
- Seed kc-backend-status in localStorage via addInitScript
- Replace console.log debug with throw-on-failure diagnostic dump that appears in CI annotations
- Track all API requests and browser errors for debugging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
